text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days have gone by since Agnes Tachyon ditched the tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot her in the hallway, and to avoid being wrapped up in another
freak experiment, I silently try to escape—

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Then... you've made up your mind? You're really going to leave?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By "leave"... Does she mean dropping out? I suddenly stop, absorbed
in their conversation.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I suppose. It appears that the academy forcing me to enter the
last tryouts was them giving me one last chance.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
You could've just... entered the tryouts. Or maybe... attended a few
more classes...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'll always pass on wasting time that could go into my research. That
said, I've always attended the useful classes.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But... if you drop out, you won't be able to race in the Twinkle Series.
What will happen... to your research?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'll continue it, of course. I still have my brain and body here with me,
after all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And it's not as if the Twinkle Series is the only place to race against
the best Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I should move my lab overseas! The UK, France, America,
Dubai—the possibilities are limitless!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Overseas... That's... pretty bold of you...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ha-ha-ha! Anything for the sake of my research!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In any case, I plan to use this Umamusume body of mine, of Agnes
Tachyon, to discover what lies beyond our top speed. That hasn't
changed one bit.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Is that so?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's this? Might you be worried about me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Could it be that after being experimented on so many times, you've
come around?! Never fear—I'm willing to send my future medicines to
you!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
No thanks... I'm just hoping... I won't be wrapped up in weird
experiments... ever again.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But... I'm glad you're continuing your research. Goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Cafe, wait! I have one final experiment... But I guess she's gone
already.
choice_data_list: Are you dropping out of Tracen Academy?
Are you dropping out of Tracen Academy?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, rookie trainer. We've been seeing each other a lot lately,
haven't we?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You nailed it. I got in because of everyone's hopes for me, and they
even overlooked my eccentricities—but it looks like the higher-ups
finally had enough.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This academy is renowned for prioritizing its students' freedom and
does so by providing them with cutting-edge training facilities.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But it has no need for students who neither get scouted nor make
their official debut.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't need someone who skips class and refuses scouting offers in
favor of research.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: In the end, the academy recommended that I drop out.
choice_data_list: Do you plan to go along with it?
Do you plan to go along with it?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's a shame I won't be able to enter the Twinkle Series. And my
research will surely slow down as well.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
However... it's still better than letting my research stagnate in favor of
school.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I knew this day would come. Perhaps I was waiting for it. Actually, this
is—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I won't have you saying something as sad as "This is a blessing."

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh? Now here's a surprise. If it isn't one of the academy's top brass.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to interrupt, but I have some business with her. Agnes Tachyon,
do you really intend to leave this academy?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My intentions are to continue my research, President. Is that all you
came here to ask?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Yes, that is all. As such, I have a request for you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: A request? Hmph, what could it be?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Agnes Tachyon—come for a run with me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and there you are in the stands. Rookie trainer, you're rather
persistent, now aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The rumored Agnes Tachyon running with the Emperor, Symboli
Rudolf? Nothing in the world could dissuade me from watching.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. I don't hate a person who's starving for knowledge. Watch to
your heart's content...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Because this is the last time I'll run on this track.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for the wait, Agnes Tachyon. It's just us two... and this rookie
trainer. Looks like we can enjoy our duel in peace.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that precisely why you picked this time slot? I don't know what
you're planning, though.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm... Now then, does 2,000 meters on turf sound good to you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Anything is fine with me. I'm sure I'm greatly indebted to you, so I'd
be happy to return the favor.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: There is no reason to thank me—in the end, I failed to protect you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ha-ha-ha! You're always way too serious! Anyways, 2,000 meters on
turf, right? I'll go get ready.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
She enrolled at Tracen to enter the Twinkle Series for her research.
But if her duties as a student here hinder her research, then her
leaving is inevitable.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There's no need for her to stick with the Twinkle Series. She can move
her base of operations anywhere else and enter other races with
skilled competitors.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Everything she does is so logical, which makes it all the more strange,
does it not?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Why has she chosen to stay at this academy until breaking point?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Why this academy, where she can't avoid the trainers she herself calls
nuisances?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the race between Agnes Tachyon and Symboli Rudolf begins,
with me as its sole spectator!
